# Legal / Compliance Review Packet Template

## Use when

- new quantified claim,
- competitor comparison,
- guarantee,
- security/privacy claim,
- AI capability claim,
- regulated/sensitive category,
- new offer/pricing structure,
- testimonial/case study,
- expansion to new jurisdiction.

## Packet

```markdown
# Review Packet

Campaign:
Product:
Channel:
Audience:
Buyer state:
Landing page:
Offer:

## Proposed ads

[Insert copy and creative previews]

## Claims used

| Claim ID | Approved wording | Proof | Expiry | Disclaimer |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## Risk analysis

- Platform risk:
- Legal/regulator risk:
- Privacy risk:
- Dark pattern risk:
- Brand risk:

## Landing page consistency

How the page substantiates the ad promise:

## Required decision

Approve / approve with edits / reject / needs more evidence
```

## Reviewer rules

- Review copy and landing page together.
- Review visuals, not just text.
- Review targeting when policy-sensitive.
- Review disclaimers and proof placement.
- Record exact approved wording.

## Mindset

Legal review should not be a vague obstacle. It should become a structured input into faster safe launches.
